zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Chaworth於1391年9月1日出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世時，她的父親Thomas Chaworth16歲，母親Nichola Braybrooke17歲。她於1422年8月24日與Sir John Scrope在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年3月12日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Chaworth于1391年9月1日出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世时，她的父亲Thomas Chaworth16岁，母亲Nichola Braybrooke17岁。她于1422年8月24日与Sir John Scrope在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年3月12日在英国英格兰越可爾享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Chaworth was born on 1 September 1391, in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Chaworth, was 16 and her mother, Nichola Braybrooke, was 17. She married Sir John Scrope on 24 August 1422, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 12 March 1467, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Chaworth est née le 1 septembre 1391, à Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Chaworth, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Nichola Braybrooke, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Scrope le 24 août 1422, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1467, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Chaworth am 1. September 1391 in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Chaworth 16 und ihre Mutter Nichola Braybrooke 17. Sie hat am 24. August 1422 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. März 1467 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Chaworth è nata il il 1 settembre 1391 nel Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Chaworth, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Nichola Braybrooke, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Scrope il 24 agosto 1422, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1467, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Chaworthが1391年9月1日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアビンガムで生まれた時，父Thomas Chaworthは16歳，母Nichola Braybrookeは17歳であった。1422年8月24日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでSir John Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年3月12日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Chaworth(이)가 1391년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 빙함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Chaworth(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichola Braybrooke(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1422년 8월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Sir John Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.1 September 1391–12 March 1467: 1 de setembro de 1391–12 de março de 1467
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Chaworth nasceu em 1 de setembro de 1391, em Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Chaworth, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Nichola Braybrooke, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Scrope em 24 de agosto de 1422, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de março de 1467, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Chaworth родилась 1 сентября 1391 г. в местности бингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Chaworth было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Nichola Braybrooke, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Scrope 24 августа 1422 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 12 марта 1467 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1 September 1391–12 March 1467: 1 de septiembre de 1391–12 de marzo de 1467
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Chaworth nació el 1 de septiembre de 1391, en Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Chaworth, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Nichola Braybrooke, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir John Scrope el 24 de agosto de 1422, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1467, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
